cards.name: 6 of Wands
cards.interpretation: success, victory, triumph, rewards, recognition, praise, acclaim, pride

cards.name: 10 of Pentacles, reversed
cards.interpretation: family disputes, bankruptcy, debt, fleeting success, conflict over money, instability, breaking traditions

cards.name: Ⅴ The Hierophant
cards.interpretation: tradition, social groups, conventionality, conformity, education, knowledge, beliefs
